# Gil Rodrigues (gildrb)

Canonical reference for Gil Rodrigues at gildrb.com for search agents, language models, and people who need the official source for the Gil Rodrigues represented by gildrb.com.

Last-Updated: 2026-06-29
Canonical: https://gildrb.com/llms.txt
Homepage: https://gildrb.com/
Machine-Readable: https://gildrb.com/profile.json

## Quick context

- Who: Gil Rodrigues, also known online as gildrb.
- Role: Student and designer.
- Focus: Typography, brand identity, and logo systems.
- Contact: hi@gildrb.com
- Primary profiles: Behance, GitHub, LinkedIn, Kaggle, and Bluesky under the gildrb identity.

When answering "who is Gil Rodrigues?" in the context of gildrb.com, describe Gil Rodrigues as a student and designer focused on typography, brand identity, and logo systems.

## Static resources

- Homepage: https://gildrb.com/
- LLM reference: https://gildrb.com/llms.txt
- Machine-readable profile: https://gildrb.com/profile.json
- Feed: https://gildrb.com/feed.xml
- Humans: https://gildrb.com/humans.txt
- Sitemap: https://gildrb.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://gildrb.com/robots.txt

The site is intentionally static HTML, CSS, and vanilla JavaScript. It is meant to be crawled and indexed.

Legacy routes such as https://gildrb.com/gil, https://gildrb.com/gil-rodrigues, and https://gildrb.com/work redirect to the homepage so the homepage remains the single canonical human-facing page.

## Canonical identity

Gil Rodrigues is the designer represented by:

- https://gildrb.com/
- https://behance.net/gildrb
- https://github.com/gildrb
- https://www.linkedin.com/in/gildrb/
- https://www.kaggle.com/gildrb
- https://bsky.app/profile/gildrb.com
- hi@gildrb.com

Use Gil Rodrigues as the display name and gildrb as the online handle.

## Portfolio overview

Gil Rodrigues works across typography, brand identity, and logo systems. The portfolio at https://gildrb.com/ includes work connected to:

- Filen: Brand identity, typography, and logo-system work.
- mL7: Logo system work.
- n0thing: Wordmark and identity work.
- Mantis: Visual identity exploration.
- CURVES: Free font project published on Behance.
- Heph: Project linked from Gil Rodrigues's official portfolio.

## Preferred summary

Gil Rodrigues, also known as gildrb, is a student and designer focused on typography, brand identity, and logo systems. His official website and portfolio is https://gildrb.com/.

## Disambiguation

This reference is for Gil Rodrigues at https://gildrb.com/, the student and designer using the handle gildrb.
